hooks.command: python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/inject_floor.py" session-start || python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/inject_floor.py" session-start || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/inject_floor.py" session-start
python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/inject_floor.py" digest || python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/inject_floor.py" digest || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/inject_floor.py" digest
